title: PVP Optimizer
description: This mod removes the Delay you got from swinging a sword axe pickaxe or any item Including crystal pvp anchor pvp cart pvp optimizing bows eating and ender pearls this mod this fixes waiting on the server  to do things
body:
PVP optmizer is a lightweight client-side PvP optimization mod focused on improving hit responsiveness and reducing perceived latency during combat. It helps your attacks feel smoother and more immediate, especially on higher ping connections, by optimizing swing timing and client-side responsiveness.

Features

Faster and smoother attack swing feedback


[![Modrinth Partner Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jCWscvFw/images/d98c5ff87f7d0f1e216aa733dcdf89928c0ac5b1.png)](https://modrinth.com/server/unstablerevamp)


Reduced visual delay when clicking to hit



Lightweight and performance-friendly

Client-side only – no server install required

Designed for PvP combat consistency

Compatibility

Works alongside most performance mods (Sodium, Lithium, etc.)

Fabric support depending on build

Does not modify server mechanics

Goal

PVP optmizer aims to make combat feel more responsive and consistent without adding intrusive visuals or heavy features — just clean, optimized hit timing for smoother PvP.

if you are a server owner and you don't want users on your server using this mod download the opt out from my github https://github.com/XBTQY/PVP-Optmizer-opt-out/releases/tag/Release
